subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates to a state official.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(11), eff. January 1, 2012.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The registration remains valid until December 31 of each year.
a justice of the supreme court;
a judge of the court of criminal appeals;
the commissioner of the General Land Office;
a member of the Railroad Commission of Texas;
a member of the State Board of Education.

history.raw: Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1251 (S.B.1914), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.
